calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-25-2005 Continued To May-31-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Arnold Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Plaintiff's witness: Booker Thomas, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Presley Jones.
Exhibit 1 - Three day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 459 Turk St., #309, San Francisco.
Costs $151.30
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-25-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ARNOLD EVJE FOR PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
NO APPEARANCE BY PRESLEY JONES

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
